name: Gunther Wolfsblood

sheet.name: Gunther Wolfsblood
sheet.background_story:
Current:
Gunther is surrounded by the ghosts of his former party members sent to death in quests, tournaments, and events. These actions weigh heavy on his soul.

He stays behind in The Stalwart, both to bury Rita and protect it.

Affiliations:
Conclave Representative
Concord Researcher

Background: 
Gunther Wolfsblood began the 18th cycle with confused faith as he was instantly drawn to Her radiant knowledge and equally fascinated with the Worm's Cycles of death & rebirth.

If the sides were drawn between Two, with the only intermediary being the Chaos of the Darkblades, Gunther would lean towards Her Light. But he knows this world isn't black and white, nor grey for that matter.. Besides, Agora has had horrible interpretations thus far. Gunther never trusted Remo the Deceiver.

There is little to no discrimination for the source of knowledge, nor thought put into with whom it is shared. Gunther's information may come to the aid of one side today or another at any given time - but his allegiance is to that knowledge alone.
